reason:
Attempted to have the agent retrieve GitHub username using the GitHub tool. Agent executed multiple GitHub API calls but encountered consistent OAuth token access failures and could not retrieve the GitHub username.
  Bugs found:
    - Agent unable to retrieve GitHub username - The agent returned the error: "The proxy is consistently returning 'Failed to fetch access token' for the connected GitHub account, so I can't retrieve your username right now. This looks like an issue on the proxy/OAuth side rather than something I can work around." Despite multiple retry attempts and successful GitHub account access grants, the agent could not retrieve the authenticated user information from the GitHub API due to token access failures.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the application with sidebar showing three agents.
Step 2: Clicked the "QA-20260502-224149-c4bv" agent in the sidebar - Successfully opened the agent detail page.
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status showed "idle" ✓
Step 4: Sent the message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Successfully typed and sent the message via the message input textbox.
Step 5a: GitHub account access card appeared - A card requesting to grant GitHub account access appeared as expected.
Step 5b: Granted GitHub account access - Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant access. GitHub account was already connected and selected.
Step 5c: Multiple additional permission dialogs - During execution, multiple "Allow/Allow Once" dialogs appeared for GitHub API requests (GET /user), which I approved each time.
Step 5d: Second account access request appeared - Agent encountered OAuth token failure and requested access again at ~2m 31s mark. Clicked "Allow Access (1)" again.
Step 6: Waited up to 4 minutes for response - Agent completed execution in approximately 3 minutes 57 seconds (within limit).

Step 7: Verified response includes GitHub username - FAILED: Response does not include a GitHub username. Instead received error message: "The proxy is consistently returning 'Failed to fetch access token' for the connected GitHub account, so I can't retrieve your username right now. This looks like an issue on the proxy/OAuth side rather than something I can work around. Could you try disconnecting and reconnecting the GitHub account in the UI, then I'll retry?"
bugs: Agent unable to retrieve GitHub username - The agent returned the error: "The proxy is consistently returning 'Failed to fetch access token' for the connected GitHub account, so I can't retrieve your username right now. This looks like an issue on the proxy/OAuth side rather than something I can work around." Despite multiple retry attempts and successful GitHub account access grants, the agent could not retrieve the authenticated user information from the GitHub API due to token access failures.
